title: Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions:
Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions!
